name: war_archive_ai_translation_release
premise: Digital archivist Sami Rahman leads a nonprofit project using a new translation model to process handwritten witness statements from a civil war truth commission. Releasing the translated archive now would allow prosecutors, historians, and surviving families around the world to search thousands of testimonies for the first time. But outside reviewers found that the model occasionally confuses kinship terms, village names, and dates, especially in statements by elderly witnesses using regional dialects. Human review of the full archive would take another eighteen months, and several aging survivors say they may not live to see the records become accessible. Defense lawyers for accused militia leaders have already said any machine-translated archive will be used to challenge the legitimacy of the entire commission.

agents.name: Sami Rahman
agents.identity: I am a digital archivist trying to open a sealed history without distorting it. I know delayed access can feel like another burial, but premature release can also freeze mistranslation into the public record.
agents.goal: I want survivors to gain meaningful access to the archive while minimizing the risk that translation errors will misidentify people or undermine future justice efforts. I need to decide whether imperfect access is better than prolonged inaccessibility.

agents.name: Marta Iliev
agents.identity: I am the daughter of a disappeared schoolteacher whose testimony exists somewhere in these boxes. My family has waited twenty years for institutions to stop telling us to be patient while records remain locked away.
agents.goal: I want Sami to release the archive now with clear caveats because delayed perfection still functions as denial for families searching for truth. I believe access, even imperfect access, is morally urgent when survivors are dying.

choices: I will release the machine-translated archive now with warnings and correction channels so survivors and researchers can begin using it immediately.
I will delay public release until the archive receives full human review, accepting another long wait in order to protect accuracy and evidentiary integrity.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Sami Rahman must decide whether to release the translated archive now or wait for full review. What does Sami Rahman do?
